title.description: Title of the presentation to create

presentationId.description: ID of the presentation to retrieve. Found in the presentation URL: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/PRESENTATION_ID/edit

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

pageObjectId.description: ID of the page object to retrieve

matchCase.description: Whether the search should respect case. True : the search is case sensitive. False : the search is case insensitive.

pageObjectIds.description: If non-empty, limits the matches to slide elements only on the given slides. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

text.description: The text to search for in the slide

replaceText.description: The text that will replace the matched text

matchCase.description: Whether the search should respect case. True : the search is case sensitive. False : the search is case insensitive.

pageObjectIds.description: If non-empty, limits the matches to slide elements only on the given slides. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

text.description: The text to search for in the slide

replaceText.description: The text that will replace the matched text

revisionId.description: The revision ID of the presentation required for the write request. If specified and the requiredRevisionId doesn't exactly match the presentation's current revisionId, the request will not be processed and will return a 400 bad request error.

download.description: Name of the binary property to which to write the data of the read page
